summary: Tested Checklists, Reports Builder, and Stripe Payments features. Fixed 2 bugs: 1) Backend reports query endpoint using incorrect boolean check for MongoDB collection, 2) Frontend ReportsBuilder using empty string value in SelectItem. All 17 backend tests pass. All frontend features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checklists, Reports Builder, and Stripe Payments features fully tested. Two bugs were fixed during testing.

checklists_page.page_load: PASS - Title 'Evidence-Based Checklists' with RFC-002 reference displayed
checklists_page.active_jobs_section: PASS - Shows job list with search and status filter
checklists_page.status_filter: PASS - Dropdown with All Statuses, Dispatched, In Progress, Out for Service options
checklists_page.search_input: PASS - Search jobs input field present
checklists_page.job_selection: PASS - 'Select a job to view its checklist' placeholder shown

reports_builder.page_load: PASS - Title 'Reports Builder' with RFC-002 Section 4.8.2 reference
reports_builder.summary_cards: PASS - Total Jobs, Revenue, Customers, Conversion Rate metrics displayed
reports_builder.data_source_selector: PASS - Jobs, Customers, Invoices, Technicians, Inventory, Leads options
reports_builder.columns_selection: PASS - Checkboxes for selecting report columns
reports_builder.run_report: PASS - Generates report with 24 records displayed in table

invoices_pay_online.page_load: PASS - Invoices & Payments page with metrics
invoices_pay_online.invoice_dropdown: PASS - Dropdown menu opens on invoice card
invoices_pay_online.pay_online_button: PASS - 'Pay Online' option visible in green at top of dropdown

sidebar_navigation.reports_link: PASS - Reports link visible in sidebar navigation
sidebar_navigation.checklists_link: PASS - Checklists link visible in sidebar navigation

backend_apis.reports_query: PASS - /api/reports/query works with all data sources (jobs, customers, invoices)
backend_apis.stripe_checkout_create: PASS - /api/payments/checkout/create endpoint exists (returns 400 for missing params)
backend_apis.job_types_api: PASS - /api/job-types returns job types for checklist templates

backend_reports_query.issue: Used 'if not collection:' which fails for MongoDB collection objects

frontend_reports_builder.issue: SelectItem with empty string value '' causes React error
frontend_reports_builder.fix: Changed to use 'none' as value and convert in onValueChange handler
